reviews.review_title: This game is fire I don’t get the hate
reviews.review_description: I switched over to this game from totf2 but this game is better in a lot of ways. First of all the ragdolls and just overall the punching feels better. On totf2 they just make a weird face when they get hit hard, but in this game they actually get wobbly. This game also has more maps and gore which I think is really important in a boxing Vr game. Even tho the multiplayer isn’t the best I still prefer it over the totf2 multiplayer. The Ai’s in this game are actually like a real person. In totf2 they just spam moves. This game also has more customization than totf2. U can customize Ai and their are more multiplayer game modes coming soon I’m pretty sure

Development team lied to everyone in the beginning and made a lot of false promises.
No good updates, pretended to listen to feedback but never fixed issues. Kept promising improvements that were never made. The game is unplayable. Don’t waste your money. Also dev team kicked me out of discord for giving my honest feedback.

Great game been playing since release but I just need one thing tournament mode or a career/story that would top the game and clear any other fighting game on the meta store but overall it’s still a top tear boxing game,realistic-good blood and hit physics-a bit janky but expected did I mention it was a great game?

Good game there are some very good players that I don’t know that very good but you need to make some updates with the multiplayer when you hit it says no damage taken, and you should make a little more damage multiplier, and the care and the people have less damage to knock someone out and you should definitely add the UFC octagon with UFC gloves

reviews.review_title: Love it, but really want it finished.
reviews.review_description:
By far the best thing about this game is the gore, feels way more realistic. Especially bare knuckle. But the best thing which puts this game above others in my opinion is the rush of when you have an opponent hurt and you get to empty the gas tank as reckless as you can to try and put them away. This is so fun. Also love that it is achievable to just land a one shot knockout. 
The downfall is that at the moment I’m fighting the same computer opponents on the hardest setting and it’s not really the challenge anymore. Therefore I just lose interest. 
Online isn’t an option for me at the moment so I haven’t fought online but the offline game, I’m hoping that there are more and more opponents and the difficulty gets harder, but not stupid. I don’t want to fight opponents that need to be hit by a cement truck to be knocked out. But boxers that are technically good and pick up on your flaws. But love it so far. Just hoping the complete game delivers. But certainly on the right track. Good work. 👌🏻👌🏻

reviews.review_title: For u, see review by updated date.
reviews.review_description:
Unlike the early reviews, the more recent ones give you a much clearer picture of what this game is really like.

For my background, I work in a customer satisfaction team, so I’m not the type of person who usually leaves negative reviews—whether it’s about a game or a product. Also, I often use boxing VR as a warm-up before heading to the gym

When this game was first announced, many people believed it could surpass TOF1—and I was one of them. Like many other VR games, it launched under the excuse of being “Early Access,” with low polish and unfinished systems, but I still kept my hopes up since updates were coming frequently at the start.

Unfortunately, the updates stopped at version 0.168. Compared not only to TOF but even to other poorly-reviewed boxing games, this title hasn’t improved at all—aside from its graphics.

Broken hitboxes
Opponents showing no reaction even when hit - except bleeding and some impact pose, nothing make me advantage on the game playing.. 
No clear feedback on whether your punches land or not
A laughably bad damage system that leaves you confused

Even someone who’s been to a boxing gym for just three months would immediately question, “Is this supposed to be boxing?”

It feels like the game was rushed out with barely four indistinguishable characters, all to satisfy investors, rather than deliver a complete experience. In the end, maybe I’m the fool for holding on to hope and missing the refund window.

I have to go back to TOF.  Even it released quite ago, no boxing game still beats it yet - this is really sad story for current VR games as is...


Add + No update over 6 months... still early access.. are they actaully working on this game? or just gave up since it is too messy?

It’s good graphics and feedback wise. But that’s about where it ends for example I fought someone who had like 2ft on me (I’m 5,11) and I had them DRENCHED in blood my character had 1 drop on him and he won. Worst part is I did 10k damage to him and he did 6k to me. Also the ban system doesn’t work as there is constant spamming and people who just don’t want to actually fight. Elo system is bad and more than half the time my character has the wingspan of a 10 yo. Pretty unenjoyable unless you’re in solo mode and even that needs heavy work. And the ragdolls are WAYYYY different than what it shows in the description and a lot more stiff almost like you killed them

Im gonna give this game a break because its still in development. Coming from TOTF2 the bots are so easy to fight in this game im not even sure its possible to get knocked out. One thing I dont like is when the bots will just randomly stop fighting to taunt and when you hit them with a clean shot the wobbling is very overexadurated. I saw alot of reviews saying this is better than TOTF. From my personal experience I think this game doesnt train you with as much intensity and doesnt getting you as good at footwork and managing distance as TOTF because in TOTF there's more consequences to getting hit. In this game it feels like even on hard mode these guys are like getting hit by air. The multi-player is i little annoying sometimes. And it doesnt feels as much as like a fight as TOTF. Now on to the good things. One things I noticed immediately is the graphics. The shadow of my character on the ring floor from the sunlight. Its beautiful. I love the gym environment and the looks of the opponents I cant wait until they add more character features and maps. Damage system is nice not too easy not too hard. I did notice that the damage system is very inconsistent. Its almost as if the damage system adjusts mid game. At the begging of the fight im knocking out the dude twice and all the sudden I cant knock him out only wobble him. The game isnt a bad game just unique in its own way. Hope they fix this stuff and cant wait to see what else they add to this game.

Ever since I got this game I was so excited for the “realistic” physics in this game, until I took a raging turn. All I’ve been fighting were spammers doing the most random punches, AND STILL KNOCKING ME OUT. This game was supposed to be my new workout game but holy moly was I wrong. I’ve had 6,5 people, who are hight glitching, swing they’re arms like a maniac, stunning me and knocking me out. Sometimes I’ve had people who fought at the same height, but they just swing their arms, knock me out somehow, and call it a day. I myself am a trained boxer and I’ve never wanted to smash my Vr. The only decent thing is the bots. For now, I’ll be at thrill of the fight 2. Fix. Your. Game.

I refuse to box online cause people cheat so bad its pointless, but now the AI are running out of my guardian and literally standing for over a minute where I cant get them, that needs fixed or ill stop playing the game all together, you for real thought it was a good idea to program taunting and running away? Morons

Honestly the game looks making in VIDEOS never good on actually playing. I bought this on a bundle with Haymaker another fighting game with worst graphics but somehow it trumps the is game completely. I was so excited then I loaded into the scruffy beginning map and fought a dud who was impossible to knock down. After hitting this dude for what felt like 5 minutes the round just ends and it says you lose. Honestly don’t waste your money on this game even if it’s on sale. Buy something good instead and save yourself the disappointment.

reviews.review_title: Game doesnt work and Meta refuses refund
reviews.review_description:
​This game used to work, but after recent updates, it is completely broken and literally unplayable. It either crashes instantly on startup or leaves me stuck on a permanent black screen. I have tried everything: restarting my Quest, clearing the app data, and completely reinstalling the game multiple times. Nothing works.
​To make matters worse, Meta Support completely refuses to help or issue a refund because of their automated policy limits, leaving me with a broken product that I paid full price for.
​Do not buy this game until the developers actually fix this software. Total waste of money in its current state.

It’s great! It’s refreshing to see a boxing game without ridiculous secondary mechanics like soft blocking lol but please please make an option for Asian facial features I haven’t found a single boxing game I can make my character look at all like me

I would like to see an option to record the fight from a third person view from outside the ring.  It would look really cool and would allow you as a fighter to see from a distance what you are doing and what you need to work on.
This game play is good but the product is not finished. I bought this with the intent of getting single player mode. It’s been over a year and still nothing. It was advertised to be coming soon.

Cool, I land more hits, its 2500 to 4000.

reviews.review_title: This game is SO good, why is there hate
reviews.review_description:
This game is actually amazing, this game is far more realistic and better in general than thrill of the fight. I really recommend getting this vr
 game if you wanna play boxing

First of all, I understand that this game is still in development, but there is a lot to fix. Don’t even bother with trying to play multiplayer on this game, it’s full of morons who spam punches like Bruce Lee and somehow get thousands of damage for it. Also, the tracking is terrible. If your opponent has a slight amount of ping, and throws a punch, it will disappear entirely and land square on your nose for way too much damage. This is an issue in single player too, mostly when you don’t have your controllers directly in front of you. The single player option is great for the most part, but for it’s almost unplayable on the hard difficulty. I don’t understand how I’m getting 12,000 damage a round and my opponent doesn’t even get stunned, and even if I do stun them, why do they randomly crouch down way out of my reach and it’s impossible for a follow up? When playing with boxing gloves I wish after a few good hits on their gloves they would drop their gloves, but instead they just hold their hands up and you can’t dit the glove in any gaps to land a hit. The only way to win with gloves is counter punching. All said and done, I keep coming back to this game over any other boxing game, only on the easy difficulty with bare firsts, because it’s one of the most realistic. The charecter animations are the best there is and the maps are pretty detailed. If the bugs that are very apparent in this game are fixed, it’d will easily be a 5/5 star game.

So i bought this game 2 days ago and ever since i downloaded it, it doesnt let me load in i see the red background and the guy staring but when i try to get in it gives me a error saying that 5 attempts have been made and its says for me to try a via hotspot and then it counts down by 5 and closes my app. I have uninstalled it and reinstalled and even tried resetting my headset and internet itself but it still gives me an error can someone help? if not i might just have to get a refund. very unfortunate because i heard a lot of hype about this game:(

First lets say whats good. The knockdowns are unique and unlike other games aren't repetitive also the gore is better than any other boxing game.

But theres more negatives than positives. The scoring system is abysmal, the last fight i did was scored 28-28.

Round 1 was scored 10-9 them as there were no knockdowns and they did about 100 more damage.

Round 2 was 9-9 due to there being no knockdowns but i did about 750 more damage so how is that 9-9.

Round 3 i won 10-10 no kncokdowns i did more damage so really i should have won the second round and the whole fight no? This has been a consistent issue since i bought the game last year. 

The damage system is laughable i land a jab that does 40-70 damage in multiplayer at the most but in single player i do over double that with a jab and the same goes for all punches. Also ive landed telegraphed jabs that do more damage than perfect overhands and hooks that land clean on the jaw. Not to mention after a these clean punches with perfect tecnique and accuracy dont knockthem down my opponent who spams hooks at 100 hooks per second knocks me out. And that only happens if you acctually find a match. Glitches online so if they spam or are afk i can not leave the match and have to restart the game entirely. 

If you want a good fighting game i would reccomend toft 2 or haymaker over this

Edit: just had another 2 fights and lost both to opponents who were spamming, throwing spinning backfists, ducking to my knees and walking through me to hit me in the back of the head even thkugh the game says these are aginst the rules also i through a big left jand from slipping a jab that landed as clean as it gets and did only 36 damage. This game needs serious updating especially in the online area

reviews.review_description:
Too many cheaters, block list at 100 not an acceptable solution. 100 cheaters. That's insane. Best VR boxing when two people are playing legit but the game is unplayable for top tier fighters, I can't get anyone to accept a fight and there is no mechanism to punish fight dodgers. My record is like 1260-9 so keep in mind this context, I get why people don't want to fight but that means I literally can't play, so how can it be anything other than 1 star for me?

reviews.review_title: worst boxing game on the market
reviews.review_description: This game is absolute garbage. Complete money grab. Thrill of the Fight 1 is better than this game, and that’s saying something. First off, multiplayer sucks. Hits don’t even register most of the time, and when they do, they no damage plus, I don’t even know why I’m the one being knocked down in multiplayer after taking a four hit combo that did barely over 150 damage and when I hit a three hit combo that does over 500 damage plus extra that I didn’t count, IT DOESNT EVEN STUN HIM! Also, on top of all that, blocking sucks in multiplayer. Defense is a huge aspect in boxing, so when I have to dodge my head off, IT GETS PRETTY ANNOYING. Those 3 things alone ruin the main aspect of the game, multiplayer or I’m guessing that it’s the main aspect of the game since single player has no variety. In single player, there are only 4 boxers you can fight and it doesn’t matter the difficulty, you always win. So it’s either suffering in multiplayer or being bored in single player. IT DOENST MATTER HOW BAD OTHER BOXING GAMES ON VR ARE, THIS ONE SUCKS. DO NOT BUY.
Fun.

reviews.review_title: Updated review. Great game, a new fav.
reviews.review_description:
Okay ended up getting the game to work. I had to reset my headset because of a file corruption issue. 

This game is amazing. The mechanics and feel is a lot more realistic than thrill of the fight 2. I really enjoyed doing bareknuckle fights in single player. I haven't tried multi-player yet.

UPDATED REVIEW: 
This game is on a stand still. I have been spending a lot of time playing The Thrill of The Fight 2. TOTF2 made huge improvements in the past few months. I came back to this game and it felt very unfinished. Boxing Underdog has top notch graphics but lots of issues otherwise. I only hope the official full release will happen sometime this year with lots of improvement. Until then, I am sticking with TOTF2.

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
This game is pretty good for early access. Some bugs here and there but very impressive overall. Single player AI seems a little weak even on Hard difficulty. I think TOTF AI is still better. I also wish it would allow me to set up to 12 rounds like in TOTF. But then I tried the multiplayer. Normally I play single player games as online multiplayer does not appeal to me. However, this game's multiplayer is fun. Yes there are bugs but still fun. Not a big fan of the slow motion after taking a major hit. I feel like blurry vision could be a better option.

First of all, I'm a former amateur boxer and a current pro MMA fighter. So there, before you start making assumptions as to who the F**k I am lol. This game is by far the best boxing game I've ever played. I love how it rewards you for your position when throwing punches and makes your power even harder when you know what you're doing. To all you haters that claim that it doesn't block, y'all are crazy, it blocked perfectly and it also allows your head movement to lessen the power of other players punching you. I have played against these so-called  "hook cheaters" and I've beat many of them by creating angles and keeping my hands up, also countering like I would in a real fight, and it works perfectly. Theresn't and career option yet, but with the training, the quick fights and the online fighting I've been able to have fun, lose weight and better my skills overtime. I really suggest you compare it to any boxing game you ever experienced and I bet you this one is more fun, more realistic and its still growing little by little. Love and Respect to all the athletes out there. Let's get it!!
if like fighting in the ring or street fighting you shud buy this it has good gore and good ragdoll
No one knows how to fight this game is a waste of money and time

TLDR: not recommended. If developer shows any intention of pushing more updates I will update my review. For now, very disappointed with the pace of development, given the lack of features in the game. I strongly recommend getting ToTF 2 instead of this game. This game feels like it was abandoned already.

I have Thrill of the fight (ToTF) 1, TotF2 and Boxing Underdog (BU). I am going to try to compare them against each other on different categories so you can decide what is more important to you. In each category I am ranking them from best to worst.

Hit detection
- ToTF 2
- ToTF 1
- BU (terrible IMO, the biggest flaw)

Blocking
- ToTF 2
- ToTF 1
- BU (terrible, the second biggest flaw. Dodging is your only option).

AI
- ToTF2
- BU
- ToTF1

Release cadence (for updates)
- ToTF 2, I bought the game a couple of months ago, 3 updates so far. Actively maintained.
- BU, I bought the game a couple months ago, zero updates 
- ToTF 1 (dead)

Multiplayer
- ToTF2 (casual and ranked matchmaking, pretty great. Not long to find an opponent. Main issue is there are a lot more strong opponents than weaker ones).
- BU
*ToTF1 has no multiplayer.

Career mode
- ToTF2
*ToTF1 and BU don't have career modes

Training mode
- ToTF2 (mirror mode, dummy practice, sparring, career mode defensive, offensive and sparring trainings)
- ToTF1 (dummy training, sparring)
- BU (sparring only).

Grabbing mechanics
- ToTF2
- ToTF1
- BU (no grabbing mechanics, you can basically go through your opponent).

Graphics
- BU
- ToTF2
- ToTF1

Damage effects
- BU (cumulative damage and blood, pretty nice)
- ToTF2 (no damage on face, only indication that the opponent is struggling with facial expressions)
- ToTF1 (no damage on face, only indication that the opponent is struggling with facial expressions)

Sound effects
- ToTF2
- ToTF1
- BU

Calibration
- ToTF2 (arm and height calibration)
- ToTF1 (height calibration)
- BU (height calibration often fails, no arm calibration)

Reviewed V0.179, March 15 2026

reviews.review_title: I played totf2 sense launch this game is
reviews.review_description:
This game is so much better than thrill of the fight 2 if your just comparing game play, there is definitely room for improvement. I don’t want to say that this game is realistic, but it is definitely more balanced and I feel this game actually lets you use real techniques that I practice. Totf2 has a anti-spam Mechanic, the only problem with a Mechanic like this is that it can’t tell the difference between a feint and a real punch. When you start fainting, The punches you throw do less damage, but as someone with short arms, I have to throw a lot more feints before I throw a real punch

 Totf2 has a much more seamless match making experience they also have a bigger group of people to match you up with, if you try to play this game in the middle of the day you might be waiting for a few minutes. ( I have never waited longer than 6 or 7 minutes )
￼
DEVOLPERS PLEASE READ THIS 
I hope the developers don’t try to incorporate some sort of anti-spam Mechanic. I understand why people would feel the need but if spammers and liger are seriously managed. There wouldn’t be a need for a mechanic like this. ￼ if a player gets multiple reports of spamming, their next few opponents should be asked if they felt that way if they don’t leave a report on the player
The report button also needs to be easy to find it should pop up immediately after you block a player

reviews.review_title: At this point, blame the game

And I do love this game tho its fun, but it’s just the creators barely even fix bugs
I love this game

I want a refund, don’t listen to the 5 star reviews 100% bots I wish I could post a video of the game play I have, arm calibration is terrible the ai’s definitely don’t analyse anyone’s game play better off sticking to totf1&2 it has a bad wrap because of there first release but it’s 10x better now and you can actively communicate with the developers and point out bugs & other issues. I’m genuinely mad I bought this game, waste of money
Very slow and takes really long to match up and unrealistic.

Definitely has a realistic look to it. The physics are great, the cuts are great. It would get 5 stars if that had a little more feel in the controllers when you hit someone. Add that thump, little better sound effects and you have the clear winner in the boxing vr world imo.

reviews.review_title: Don’t listen to these bad ratings!
reviews.review_description: I am 13 years old and I got this game a little over 3 days ago, and it has been the best purchase of my life. It has really improved my boxing skills and overhand hook power. Before, I was just averaging 100 power on my overhand hooks, but now I’m averaging 150-160. This game is so much fun, it is kinda tough to get into multiplayer, but when you do, it is a blast. This is really a good game if you want to get into boxing and improve your skills at home

reviews.review_title: do not buy game is trash and rigged
reviews.review_description: i used to like this game no longer do no matter how many times you hit the opponent they will not be knocked down they hit you one time with a jab and you're on the ground the damage system is complete trash it's better than most boxing games as far as authentic the damage system needs some serious work won't do nothing but piss you off wondering how a 3 year old can throw a slap and knock you down but you're hitting them with haymakers and they're not knocked down yet but their face is completely trashed in your face is perfectly fine but they win the match underdog boxing get your together would love to have a refund so i can go to golden gloves

You can tell this is early access but it has lots of potential to be the leading boxing game.

For the devs, it needs more fighters and venues. Career mode. Spectator mode to watch friends fight. 

Longer breaks in rounds. Customisable matches for round length, breaks etc. 

Ability to train with friends would be cool. Like one holds the pads. 

Overall though, great game
